name: Atom
prompt: Turkish atom meze, thick strained labneh yogurt in a small bowl topped with whole fried dried red chili peppers and sizzling butter sauce, garlic, mezze table

name: Bal Kaymak
prompt: Turkish bal kaymak, thick clotted cream water buffalo kaymak topped with golden honey drizzle in a small white dish, walnut halves, Turkish breakfast spread

name: Balık Buğulama
prompt: Turkish balık buğulama, whole white fish steamed with tomato slices, green peppers, lemon rounds and parsley in a shallow pan with light broth

name: Domatesli Bulgur Pilavı
prompt: Turkish domatesli bulgur pilavı, fluffy coarse bulgur pilaf cooked with tomato paste and diced tomatoes, reddish orange color, mounded in a rustic bowl, parsley garnish

name: Etli Kereviz
prompt: Turkish etli kereviz stew, pale white celeriac root slices braised with small lamb meat cubes and diced carrots in light yellow lemony broth, rustic deep plate, bright home cooking, fresh dill

name: Fava
prompt: Turkish fava meze, firm smooth pale yellow broad bean puree molded and cut into neat cubes on a white plate, no sauce, drizzle of olive oil on top, dill sprig garnish, clean minimal mezze presentation

name: Hamsi Buğulama
prompt: Turkish hamsi bugulama, many small silver anchovy fish neatly arranged in a shallow pan, steamed with tomato slices, onion rings, green pepper and lemon slices, light tomato broth, Black Sea home cooking

name: Hamsi Pilavı
prompt: Turkish hamsi pilavı, baked rice pilaf covered with neatly arranged silver anchovy fillets in a round baking dish, Black Sea specialty, golden rice

name: Havuç Tarator
prompt: Turkish havuç tarator meze, grated sauteed carrots folded into thick garlic yogurt, drizzled with olive oil, walnut garnish, small white bowl, mezze table

name: Jangjorim
prompt: Korean jangjorim banchan, soy braised shredded beef strips with boiled quail eggs and sliced green chili in dark glossy soy broth, small side dish bowl

name: Kalburabastı
prompt: Turkish kalburabasti dessert, oval golden semolina pastries glistening soaked in thick syrup, crosshatch sieve pattern pressed on top, glossy wet shine, ground pistachio sprinkle, syrupy dessert plate

name: Kıymalı Erişte
prompt: Turkish kıymalı erişte, homemade square egg noodles tossed with seasoned ground beef, onions and red pepper, sprinkled with parsley, deep plate comfort food

name: Loubia (Yeşil Fasulye Yahnisi)
prompt: Lebanese loubia bi zeit, green beans stewed with tomatoes, onion and garlic in olive oil, rich red sauce, rustic bowl, Middle Eastern home cooking

name: Patlıcanlı Pilav
prompt: Turkish patlicanli pilav, rice pilaf mixed with golden brown fried peeled eggplant cubes, soft caramelized edges, diced tomato, warm buttery glossy rice mounded on plate

name: Pirinç Pilavı
prompt: Turkish plain rice pilaf sehriyeli pirinc pilavi, only white rice with small browned orzo pieces, buttery glossy separate grains, neat dome shape on a simple white plate, nothing else on the plate

name: Semizotu Salatası
prompt: Turkish semizotu salatası, fresh purslane leaves folded into thick garlic yogurt, olive oil drizzle, served in a ceramic bowl, summer meze

name: Su Muhallebisi
prompt: Turkish su muhallebisi, delicate soft white milk pudding squares in shallow syrup, dusted lightly with powdered sugar, traditional pudding shop dessert plate

name: Sütlü Nuriye
prompt: Turkish sütlü nuriye dessert, layered filo pastry with hazelnuts soaked in milky white syrup, pale creamy top, square slices on a tray, lighter milky baklava

name: Tavuk Sote
prompt: Turkish tavuk sote, chicken breast cubes sauteed with green peppers, tomatoes, onions and mushrooms in tomato sauce, sizzling pan, home style dinner

name: Twice Cooked Chicken
prompt: Sichuan twice cooked chicken stir fry, sliced chicken thigh with leeks, green bell peppers and chili bean paste doubanjiang, glossy red oil, white plate with steamed rice

name: Uskumru Dolması
prompt: Turkish uskumru dolması, whole stuffed mackerel filled with spiced rice, pine nuts and currants, grilled golden skin, sliced portions on an oval fish plate, Istanbul meyhane classic

name: Zeytinyağlı Kabak
prompt: Turkish zeytinyağlı kabak, zucchini rounds gently cooked in olive oil with onion, carrot and rice, served cold with fresh dill, light green glossy vegetables, zeytinyağlı meze plate

name: Zeytinyağlı Kereviz
prompt: Turkish zeytinyağlı kereviz, celeriac root halves cooked in olive oil with carrots, peas and lemon, served cold garnished with dill, pale vegetables in light lemony sauce
